##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Michael Scott
##DESCRIPTION=Aggregate of pale yellow to orange thin spearhead-shaped blades associated with orthoclase and intimately with analcime
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R070349
